channel.title: data science on Frank Huang
channel.description: Recent content in data science on Frank Huang

item.title: Different one hot encoding techniques
item.description: Lately I’ve been having fun with kaggle competition. Most of the time, we have to transform string to number which is called categorical data to sequencial data. The most common way of doing this is called one-hot-encoding which is an very important step when doing data cleaning. The most common usecase is transform from category data into number. sklearn has functions for this so does pandas. Let’s note them down here.

item.title: Hbase Design
item.description: HBase is an open source distributed database built on top of hadoop eco-system. It is becoming a popular choice for application who need fast and random access to large amount of data. In this post, I want to explain my summary on reading the paper written by Amandeep khurana on explaining the design of HBase architecture. This post is not meant to be read at one time since it is too long.
